records.question: Which tracks have a file size that is exactly 6735408 bytes?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT track.trackid FROM track
JOIN mediatype ON track.mediatypeid = mediatype.mediatypeid
WHERE track.bytes = 6735408
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Track.TrackId
FROM Track
INNER JOIN MediaType ON Track.MediaTypeId = MediaType.MediaTypeId
WHERE Track.Bytes = 6735408

records.question: Which tracks named Corazon Espinado have the composer F. Olivera and a unit price of 0.99?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT track.trackid FROM track
WHERE track.composer = 'F. Olivera' AND track.name = 'Corazon Espinado' AND track.unitprice = 0.99
records.pred_sql:
SELECT TrackId 
FROM Track 
WHERE Composer = 'F. Olivera' 
  AND Name = 'Corazon Espinado' 
  AND UnitPrice = 0.99

records.question: Which tracks named Revolta Olodum are at least 230191 milliseconds long, have at least 7557065 bytes, cost at least 0.99, are MPEG audio files, and have invoiceline unit prices of at least 0.99 with quantities of at most 1?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT track.trackid FROM track
JOIN invoiceline ON track.trackid = invoiceline.trackid
JOIN mediatype ON track.mediatypeid = mediatype.mediatypeid
WHERE track.milliseconds >= 230191 AND track.name = 'Revolta Olodum' AND invoiceline.unitprice >= 0.99 AND track.bytes >= 7557065 AND mediatype.name = 'MPEG audio file' AND track.unitprice >= 0.99 AND invoiceline.quantity <= 1
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT T.TrackId
FROM Track AS T
INNER JOIN InvoiceLine AS IL ON T.TrackId = IL.TrackId
INNER JOIN MediaType AS MT ON T.MediaTypeId = MT.MediaTypeId
WHERE T.Milliseconds >= 230191
  AND T.Name = 'Revolta Olodum'
  AND T.Bytes >= 7557065
  AND T.UnitPrice >= 0.99
  AND IL.UnitPrice >= 0.99
  AND IL.Quantity <= 1
  AND MT.Name = 'MPEG audio file'

records.question: Which tracks named Alive, composed by Stone Gossard, have a unit price of at most 0.99, a file size of no more than 11176623 bytes, last at least 341080 milliseconds, and are in the MPEG audio file format?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT track.trackid FROM track
JOIN mediatype ON track.mediatypeid = mediatype.mediatypeid
WHERE track.unitprice <= 0.99 AND track.bytes <= 11176623 AND track.name = 'Alive' AND track.milliseconds >= 341080 AND mediatype.name = 'MPEG audio file' AND track.composer = 'Stone Gossard'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT T.TrackId
FROM Track AS T
INNER JOIN MediaType AS M ON T.MediaTypeId = M.MediaTypeId
WHERE T.UnitPrice <= 0.99
  AND T.Bytes <= 11176623
  AND T.Name = 'Alive'
  AND T.Milliseconds >= 341080
  AND T.Composer = 'Stone Gossard'
  AND M.Name = 'MPEG audio file'

records.question: Which tracks named Gates Of Tomorrow on the album Dance Of Death cost at most $0.99 and have a file size of at most 12482688 bytes?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT track.trackid FROM track
JOIN invoiceline ON track.trackid = invoiceline.trackid
JOIN album ON track.albumid = album.albumid
WHERE track.unitprice <= 0.99 AND track.name = 'Gates Of Tomorrow' AND album.title = 'Dance Of Death' AND track.bytes <= 12482688
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT T.trackid
FROM Track AS T
INNER JOIN InvoiceLine AS IL ON T.trackid = IL.trackid
INNER JOIN Album AS A ON T.albumid = A.albumid
WHERE T.unitprice <= 0.99
  AND T.name = 'Gates Of Tomorrow'
  AND T.bytes <= 12482688
  AND A.title = 'Dance Of Death'

records.question: Which tracks were composed exactly by Apocalyptica?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT track.trackid FROM track
JOIN album ON track.albumid = album.albumid
JOIN artist ON album.artistid = artist.artistid
WHERE track.composer = 'Apocalyptica'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT T.TrackId
FROM Track AS T
INNER JOIN Album AS A ON T.AlbumId = A.AlbumId
WHERE T.Composer = 'Apocalyptica'

records.question: Which tracks composed by Lenny Kravitz are MPEG audio files priced at least $0.99 and have a duration of at most 228989 milliseconds?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT track.trackid FROM track
JOIN mediatype ON track.mediatypeid = mediatype.mediatypeid
WHERE track.milliseconds <= 228989 AND track.unitprice >= 0.99 AND mediatype.name = 'MPEG audio file' AND track.composer = 'Lenny Kravitz'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT T.TrackId
FROM Track AS T
INNER JOIN MediaType AS M ON T.MediaTypeId = M.MediaTypeId
WHERE T.Milliseconds <= 228989
  AND T.UnitPrice >= 0.99
  AND T.Composer = 'Lenny Kravitz'
  AND M.Name = 'MPEG audio file'

records.question: What track named Everything's Ruined from the album Angel Dust by Faith No More has a length of exactly 273658 milliseconds, a size of exactly 9010917 bytes, and a unit price of exactly 0.99?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT track.trackid FROM track
JOIN album ON track.albumid = album.albumid
JOIN artist ON album.artistid = artist.artistid
WHERE track.milliseconds = 273658 AND track.bytes = 9010917 AND artist.name = 'Faith No More' AND track.unitprice = 0.99 AND track.name = 'Everything''s Ruined' AND album.title = 'Angel Dust'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT 
    Track.TrackId
FROM 
    Track
INNER JOIN 
    Album ON Track.AlbumId = Album.AlbumId
INNER JOIN 
    Artist ON Album.ArtistId = Artist.ArtistId
WHERE 
    Track.Milliseconds = 273658
    AND Track.Bytes = 9010917
    AND Track.UnitPrice = 0.99
    AND Track.Name = 'Everything'
    AND Album.Title = 'Angel Dust'
    AND Artist.Name = 'Faith No More'

records.question: What tracks are exactly 358948 milliseconds long and belong to the Rock genre?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT track.trackid FROM track
JOIN invoiceline ON track.trackid = invoiceline.trackid
JOIN genre ON track.genreid = genre.genreid
WHERE track.milliseconds = 358948 AND genre.name = 'Rock'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT Track.TrackId
FROM Track
INNER JOIN InvoiceLine ON Track.TrackId = InvoiceLine.TrackId
INNER JOIN Genre ON Track.GenreId = Genre.GenreId
WHERE Track.Milliseconds = 358948
  AND Genre.Name = 'Rock'

records.question: Which tracks have a size of exactly 8351543 bytes and a unit price of at most 0.99?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT track.trackid FROM track
WHERE track.bytes = 8351543 AND track.unitprice <= 0.99
records.pred_sql:
SELECT TrackId 
FROM Track 
WHERE Bytes = 8351543 AND UnitPrice <= 0.99
